title: TaskFlow: High-Performance Kanban Board
description: Build a professional-grade Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality, state persistence, and an optimized rendering engine to handle hundreds of tasks without lag.
requirements: Dynamic column creation (To Do, In Progress, Done).
Drag-and-drop tasks between columns using a library like dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd.
Persistence using LocalStorage or a simple Backend API.
Optimized rendering using React.memo and useCallback for task items.

architecture.techStack: React 18, Tailwind CSS, dnd-kit, Lucide React

milestones.title: Static UI & State Definition
tasks: Implement the basic grid layout with Tailwind
Create mock data for initial state

milestones.title: Interactivity & DnD
tasks: Implement onDragEnd logic to update state based on target column
Add visual feedback for dragged items

milestones.title: Optimization & Persistence
tasks: Wrap TaskItem in React.memo to prevent global re-renders on a single task move
Add search bar that filters tasks in real-time

stretchGoals: Add a 'Time in Column' tracker using a custom hook.
Integrate a Dark Mode toggle using Context API.

evaluationRubric.performance: Does the app maintain 60fps during drag-and-drop with 100+ tasks?
evaluationRubric.codeQuality: Are hooks used correctly? Is the state lifting appropriate?
evaluationRubric.ux: Is the drag-and-drop intuitive? Are there loading states for persistence?
